$meta.name: Flint design tokens
$meta.source: Derived from the app icon (flint-icon.svg): warm near-black field, warm-gray faceted stone, a rare amber spark.
$meta.rule: This file is the single source of truth. Tokens.swift and tokens.css are GENERATED from it (see scripts/gen-tokens.mjs). Never hand-edit the generated files. tokens-as-truth, mirroring the repo's files-as-truth discipline.

primitive.comment: Raw values. Never referenced directly by UI code — only by the semantic layer below.

warm.comment: Warm neutral ramp. 400/600/700/800/900 are lifted straight from the icon (edge, light facet, stone, dark facet, field). R>=G>=B everywhere — never cold/blue-gray.

spark.comment: Amber accent = 'the spark'. 500/300 are the icon's spark colors. 800 is the darkened variant required for accent TEXT on light backgrounds (icon amber fails AA on white).

alpha.comment: Translucent amber for text selection / active-range highlight.

semantic.comment: What UI code references. Mode-aware: { dark, light }. Dark is primary (the icon's habitat); light is derived.

text-on-accent.comment: Foreground for content ON an amber accent fill (primary button label). Dark in BOTH modes — light text on amber fails contrast. See COMPONENTS.md → Buttons.

accent-text.comment: Use for amber text/links. Light uses the darkened amber to pass WCAG AA.

syntax.comment: Markdown highlighting for CodeMirror. Restrained by design (iA/Obsidian school): structure via weight, not rainbow color. The markup CHARS themselves are dimmed.

paper.comment: Ink canvas backgrounds. Faint warm rule lines, never harsh.

type.comment: Three native, zero-bundle families. Serif = New York (editorial reading), Sans = SF Pro (UI chrome), Mono = SF Mono (code/source).

reading.comment: Editor body. Serif. The single most-stared-at surface. Generous measure + line-height for hours of reading.

ui.comment: Native chrome. Sans. These are the DEFAULT-Dynamic-Type sizes; native code should prefer iOS text styles (.body, .headline...) so it scales. Values here are the baseline reference.

radius.comment: Squircle-soft outer containers, crisp inner content (the icon: rounded field, sharp stone). Use SwiftUI .continuous style. radius-none = editor/content area.

elevation.comment: Hierarchy by surface COLOR step + a hairline border, not by heavy shadow (the icon uses a 2px edge, not a drop shadow).

motion.comment: Functional, not decorative. Honor prefers-reduced-motion / Reduce Motion.
